heading: Exemption of retired officers of the uniformed services
label: 206 Exemption of retired officers of the uniformed services
text: Sections 203 and 205 of this title shall not apply to a retired officer of the uniformed services of the United States while not on active duty and not otherwise an officer or employee of the United States, or to any person specially excepted by Act of Congress.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 206, , , related to an offer to a judge or judicial officer to influence him, prior to the general amendment of this chapter by and is substantially covered by revised section 201.act June 25, 1948, ch. 64562 Stat. 692Pub. L. 87–849
